title: Finnish Experiences of Running Away from Substitute Care 2022-2023
description: The dataset consists of self-administered written texts on the experiences of people who have run away from substitute care. The data were originally collected for a Master's thesis. The data were collected with a writing invitation which was targeted at individuals with experiences of running away from substitute care. Participants were directed to write a free-form account of their experiences. For example, participants could write a broader text describing their life and their experience with
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
